semantic.role: Vitest unit test suite for LLM provider utility functions (parsing and context building).
responsibilities: Tests the parseMarkdownBlocks function for correct extraction of locale-tagged markdown blocks.
Tests the parseMarkdownBlocks function for handling JSON and generic markdown blocks.
Tests the parseStructuredResponse function for parsing JSON and markdown from structured LLM responses.
Mocks console.warn to verify warning behavior during parsing of malformed responses.
outOfScope: Testing the buildSupportingContext or mergeUsage functions (imported but not used in the provided skeleton).
Integration or end-to-end testing of LLM providers.
invariants: Uses the Vitest testing framework (describe, it, expect, vi).
Follows the Arrange-Act-Assert (AAA) pattern within test cases.
Imports functions from '../src/infra/llm/providers/utils.js' for unit testing.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Unit test isolation for LLM provider utility functions to ensure correct parsing of structured LLM responses and markdown blocks.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Possibly related to the 'refactor(runtime): slim llm and service boundary' commit, indicating ongoing refinement of LLM and service boundaries, which may affect the utilities under test.
